raw_consumer_statement: Used Priceline Visa # XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX back in XX/XX/2022. Was overcharged on XXXX hotel stay for {$250.00} at XXXX, XXXX XXXX in XX/XX/2022. + Was charged a no show fee from Uber when the driver never showed up, & a {$9.00} monthly fee since then, XX/XX/2022 which is outright FRAUD. I've called Barclay 's Bank, # XXXX and XXXX numerous times ; only to get an offshore rep in the XXXX with total miscommunication and Bad Accent. Can not go through this again, I get nowhere with them. Wrote letters 4X since XX/XX/2022. Just got some response saying these have to be reported within 2 statements or nothing can be done??? Very upset, & overwhelmed by this. Please help.
